description: The DMS automatically switches capacitor banks on a feeder to manage reactive power and improve voltage.

nodes.task_description: Monitor real-time power factor on the feeder.

expected_outcome.expected: System gathers live power factor readings.

nodes.task_description: The system detects a low power factor, indicating a need for reactive power support.

expected_outcome.expected: System identifies the need to switch on a capacitor bank.

nodes.task_description: Send a command to close the switch for the optimal capacitor bank to bring the power factor closer to unity.

expected_outcome.expected: System successfully operates the capacitor bank switch.
